mapper.select: /* OrderMng.selectOrderListForBo */ SELECT O.ID AS orderId, O.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, O.ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10100', O.ORDER_STATUS) AS orderStatusNm, O.PRODUCT_AMOUNT AS productAmount, O.USED_POINT AS usedPoint, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, O.CRE_TM AS creTm, P.ID AS paymentSeq, P.PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10070', P.PAYMENT_STATUS) AS paymentStatusNm, COUNT(OI.ID) AS itemCount, FN_GET_TOP_PRODUCT_NAME(O.ID) AS topProductName FROM TB_ORDER O LEFT JOIN TB_PAYMENT P ON P.ORDER_ID = O.ID AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM OI ON OI.ORDER_ID = O.ID WHERE O.CRE_TM >= #{fromDateTime} AND O.CRE_TM < #{toDateTime} GROUP BY O.ID, O.ORDER_NO, O.ORDER_STATUS, O.PRODUCT_AMOUNT, O.USED_POINT, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, O.CRE_TM, P.ID, P.PAYMENT_STATUS ORDER BY O.ID DESC

/* OrderMng.selectOrderDetailForBo */ SELECT O.ID AS orderId, O.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, O.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, O.ORDER_STATUS AS orderStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10100', O.ORDER_STATUS) AS orderStatusNm, O.PRODUCT_AMOUNT AS productAmount, O.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS discountAmount, O.USED_POINT AS usedPoint, O.PAYMENT_AMOUNT AS paymentAmount, O.EARNED_POINT AS earnedPoint, O.CRE_TM AS creTm, P.ID AS paymentSeq, P.PAYMENT_STATUS AS paymentStatus, FN_GET_CODE('10070', P.PAYMENT_STATUS) AS paymentStatusNm FROM TB_ORDER O LEFT JOIN TB_PAYMENT P ON P.ORDER_ID = O.ID AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE O.ID = #{orderId}
